c 255 255 100

w  1.5 -1.0 12.0
w  0.75 -1.0 13.3
w -0.75 -1.0 13.3
w -1.5 -1.0 12.0
w -0.75 -1.0 10.7
w  0.75 -1.0 10.7

w  1.5  2.0 12.0
w  0.75  2.0 13.3
w -0.75  2.0 13.3
w -1.5  2.0 12.0
w -0.75  2.0 10.7
w  0.75  2.0 10.7

k 1 2 3 4 5 6 1
k 7 8 9 10 11 12 7
k 1 2 8 7 1
k 2 3 9 8 2
k 3 4 10 9 3
k 4 5 11 10 4
k 5 6 12 11 5
k 6 1 7 12 6
